---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  feed:
    items: 10
    type: partial
---

Sosyal girişimcilik, sosyal politika, emek piyasaları ve akademik çalışmalar üzerine notlarım.

<hr>

<h3>Subscribe to New Posts</h3>
<p>Receive email updates when new posts are published on social entrepreneurship, social policy, labor markets, and academic research.</p>

<form
  action="https://buttondown.email/api/emails/embed-subscribe/volkani83"
  method="post"
  target="popupwindow"
  onsubmit="window.open('https://buttondown.email/volkani83', 'popupwindow')"
  class="embeddable-buttondown-form"
>
  <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="Your email address" required>
  <input type="submit" value="Subscribe">
</form>
